judgeScores.justification: The campaign excels in voice consistency and originality, positioning Lumina around calendar integration and circadian rhythm with persuasive, platform-specific social content that avoids lighting clichés. However, it critically omits the required FAQ section with 5+ questions in landing-page.txt (the file cuts off at specifications), and hero-copy.txt contains only two distinct sections instead of the mandated three, representing significant adherence failures despite strong creative execution.
